data[0].keys()

# Load utilities and search
import re, unicodedata, math, itertools
from collections import Counter

def normalize_arabic(text):
    if text is None:
        return ''
    # Ensure str
    text = str(text)
    # Remove tatweel
    text = text.replace('\u0640', '')
    # Normalize hamza forms
    text = text.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    # Map ؤ -> و, ئ -> ي, ة -> ه? maybe keep ة but many maps sometimes
    text = text.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    # Remove diacritics (harakat) and other combining marks
    # Arabic diacritics range: \u064B-\u065F and \u0610-\u061A and \u06D6-\u06ED maybe but we'll remove common
    diacritic_pattern = re.compile(r'[\u064B-\u065F\u0610-\u061A\u06D6-\u06ED\u0670\u0656-\u065F]+')
    text = diacritic_pattern.sub('', text)
    # Remove punctuation and symbols
    punct_pattern = re.compile(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', flags=re.U)  # remove non arabic/word/space?
    # But \w includes underscores and ASCII letters, so better remove punctuation explicitly
    # Let's remove ASCII punctuation and Arabic punctuation
    arabic_punct = '،؛؟“”«»ـ…ـٔ‘’"\'(){}[]<>:.,؛؟'
    for ch in arabic_punct:
        text = text.replace(ch, ' ')
    # Remove extra punctuation via regex (keep Arabic letters and numbers)
    text = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]', ' ', text)
    # Collapse spaces
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    # Lowercase ASCII if any
    text = text.lower()
    return text

def token_set(tokens):
    return set([t for t in tokens if t.strip()!=''])

def tokenize(text):
    return text.split()

def lcs_length(a,b):
    # compute longest common substring length? LCS (sequence) char-based: longest common subsequence? 
    # We'll compute longest common substring (consecutive) OR subsequence? Use substring for phrase match.
    # But we want robust: compute longest common substring length
    if not a or not b:
        return 0
    # dynamic programming for longest common substring
    la, lb = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [[0]*(lb+1) for _ in range(la+1)]
    maxlen=0
    for i in range(la-1, -1, -1):
        for j in range(lb-1, -1, -1):
            if a[i]==b[j]:
                dp[i][j] = dp[i+1][j+1]+1
                if dp[i][j]>maxlen:
                    maxlen = dp[i][j]
            else:
                dp[i][j]=0
    return maxlen

def token_f1(a,b):
    ta = tokenize(a)
    tb = tokenize(b)
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    common = sum(min(ca[t], cb[t]) for t in set(ca.keys()) & set(cb.keys()))
    if common==0:
        return 0.0
    prec = common / len(tb) if len(tb)>0 else 0
    rec = common / len(ta) if len(ta)>0 else 0
    if prec+rec==0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

# load data
hadiths = data

# get the FULL substring
full_substring = "إِنَّ اللَهَ يَبْتَلِي الْمُؤْمِنينَ بِالذَنبِ وَاللَهُ يَبْتَلِي الْمُنافِقينَ بِالرِزقِ"
snippet = "إِنَّ اللَ... بِالرِزقِ"  # snippet for info

norm_full = normalize_arabic(full_substring)
norm_snip = normalize_arabic("إِنَّ اللَ... بِالرِزقِ".replace('...', ''))
norm_full, norm_snip

results=[]
for idx,entry in enumerate(hadiths):
    # consider fields hadithTxt and Matn
    for field in ('Matn','hadithTxt'):
        txt = entry.get(field)
        if not txt:
            continue
        norm_txt = normalize_arabic(txt)
        # substring check
        contains = norm_full in norm_txt or norm_txt in norm_full
        # compute token f1 and lcs char ratio
        f1 = token_f1(norm_full, norm_txt)
        lcs_len = lcs_length(norm_full, norm_txt)
        # char lcs ratio: lcs length / max length
        maxlen = max(len(norm_full), len(norm_txt))
        lcs_ratio = lcs_len / maxlen if maxlen>0 else 0
        sim = max(f1, lcs_ratio)
        if sim>0:
            results.append((sim, f1, lcs_ratio, contains, idx, field, txt))
# sort
results_sorted = sorted(results, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
results_sorted[:20]

def normalize_arabic_v2(text):
    if text is None:
        return ''
    text = str(text)
    text = text.replace('\u0640', '')
    # Normalize hamza forms only for alef variations
    text = text.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    # Do NOT map ؤ/ئ to others
    # Remove diacritics
    diacritic_pattern = re.compile(r'[\u064B-\u065F\u0610-\u061A\u06D6-\u06ED\u0670\u0656-\u065F]+')
    text = diacritic_pattern.sub('', text)
    # Remove punctuation: Arabic punct and ascii
    arabic_punct = '،؛؟“”«»ـ…ٔ‘’"\'(){}[]<>:.,؛؟'
    for ch in arabic_punct:
        text = text.replace(ch, ' ')
    # Remove any non-Arabic letter/digit/space
    text = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]', ' ', text)
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    text = text.lower()
    return text

norm_full_v2 = normalize_arabic_v2(full_substring)
norm_full_v2

results=[]
for idx,entry in enumerate(hadiths):
    for field in ('Matn','hadithTxt'):
        txt = entry.get(field)
        if not txt:
            continue
        norm_txt = normalize_arabic_v2(txt)
        f1 = token_f1(norm_full_v2, norm_txt)
        lcs_len = lcs_length(norm_full_v2, norm_txt)
        maxlen = max(len(norm_full_v2), len(norm_txt))
        lcs_ratio = lcs_len / maxlen if maxlen>0 else 0
        sim = max(f1, lcs_ratio)
        contains = norm_full_v2 in norm_txt or norm_txt in norm_full_v2
        if sim>0:
            results.append((sim, f1, lcs_ratio, contains, idx, field, txt))
results_sorted = sorted(results, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
results_sorted[:40]
